sam-√mṛj P. -mṛjati, -mārṣṭi, -mārjati, -mārjayati (cf. √mārj), to sweep together, sweep clean, rub or wipe off, cleanse, strain, filter (Soma), purify (fire by removing ashes),  RV.  &c. &c.;
to take away, remove,  Rājat. ;
to stroke, caress,  R.
